scope.policy: archived forecasts joined to local settlements by match id; full score matrix reconstructed from archived adjustedExpectedGoals; knockout score calibration applied from archived knockoutContext

metricDefinitions.totalExactAccuracy: predicted total-goals bucket with highest probability equals actual total-goals bucket
metricDefinitions.totalAdjacentCoreAccuracy: predicted total-goals bucket is within one bucket of the actual bucket
metricDefinitions.scoreTopKAccuracy: actual exact score appears in the top K score probabilities from the reconstructed full matrix
metricDefinitions.logLoss: negative log probability assigned to the realized bucket or exact score
metricDefinitions.rps: ranked probability score over ordered total-goals buckets 0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7+

modelDecision.currentDecision: keep current production total-goals model; keep optimized total-goals model as shadow; use shrinked knockout score calibration rather than the full tail shift from the previous small-sample live replay
modelDecision.reason: A 25% calibration blend keeps the base matrix's knockout exact-score top1 hit count while preserving the calibrated matrix's top3 gain; optimized total-goals shadow has not cleared stable-window adoption gates
